title: Black Market Goods
description: Illegal black market of goods, where you can buy and sell almost all items in Minecraft.
body:
![Logo_black_market_for_modrith](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t7JcTmlk/images/4fe2b45abcc31f2726af54deb36829ea81106525.jpeg)

After installing the mod, 2 new blocks will appear in the game for new professions of residents. The mod does not add new buildings to the village and does not add the natural spawn of these blocks to the houses of the village. If you want to use the services of the black market, then you just need to craft a block with the name illegal seller or illegal buyer. Merchants have a very large assortment of goods. You can both sell goods and buy them, but know that the price for buying goods is higher!

![Craft_black_market_for_modrith](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t7JcTmlk/images/c4ce99a94d7eef8e40d1ba6c1b8d68023144e7c9.jpeg)

![Craft_black_market_for_modrith](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t7JcTmlk/images/c4ce99a94d7eef8e40d1ba6c1b8d68023144e7c9.jpeg)
